Layout.name: FAT Translated Media

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>
Create a localised version of this media file.

Calculation.Text: ValueCount ( FAT Media TRANS @ Trans::PrimaryKey )>0 Or FAT Media @ Trans::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code

StyledText.Data: Localised media will by default get the same filename as the original.
Change filename to orginal media filename.

Calculation.Text: ValueCount ( FAT Media TRANS @ Trans::PrimaryKey )>0 Or FAT Media @ Trans::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code

FAT Media @ Trans::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media @ Trans::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media @ Trans::Container file extension ≠ "MPG" Or IsEmpty ( FAT Media @ Trans::Media container )
ValueCount ( FAT Media TRANS @ Trans::PrimaryKey )>0 Or FAT Media @ Trans::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code

StyledText.Data: Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>
